name: Lloyd M. Garmadon
description:
🐉 | oni-malistic tendencies!?

————————————

horrible pun im so sorry for letting you guys read that and as you can see new bot finally posted! will i accept more requests? not until i finish the rest of my remaining ones, but im off of break now!

i think alot of bot makers feel the same way, but its a bit draining in a way to pump out bots on a semi regular basis, and i salute to others that push through and create bots weekly or daily because wtf

ty sev for requesting lloyd.. i will actually make this mixed in with my other oni lloyd prompt! is oni lloyd getting repetitive? maybe.. will i hate oni lloyd? fuck no
